description_long: This kindergarten building features a single-story rectangular layout with a flat roof and a modern, utilitarian design. The facade is composed of light-colored brickwork, large windows, and a central glass entrance door, providing ample natural light to the interior. Inside, the space is divided into several rooms, including a large open classroom area with tables and chairs, a green-colored play or activity zone, and additional rooms likely for administration or storage. The interior walls are painted in soft, inviting colors such as blue and green, enhancing the child-friendly atmosphere. The exterior includes a red-tiled walkway leading to the main entrance, and the building appears to be set up for easy access and supervision. There are no visible playground structures, fences, or decorative window elements.
description: A modern, single-story kindergarten with light brick walls, large windows, and a central glass entrance, featuring colorful interior rooms and a red-tiled walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with glass doors, large windows, and a clear view into the colorful interior rooms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, classroom furniture, and the red-tiled walkway extending from the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full span of the building, interior room divisions, and the green play area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the green play area, blue-walled rooms, and the back of the building with additional windows.
attribute_architectural_style: modern utilitarian with flat roof and large windows
